description: Ralliant Corporation engages in the design, development, manufacture, sale, and service of precision instruments and engineered products in the United States, China, and internationally. It operates through two segments, Test and Measurement; and Sensors and Safety Systems. The Test and Measurement segment provides precision test and measurement instruments, systems, software, and services markets under the TEKTRONIX, KEITHLEY INSTRUMENTS, SONIX, and EA ELECTRO-AUTOMATIK brand names. This segment offers a portfolio of industry solutions, including oscilloscopes, probes, source measuring units,
